project: EURABAY Living System - Adaptive Risk Management
description: Dynamic risk management that adapts position sizing and risk parameters based on market conditions, recent performance, and portfolio state

userStories.title: Implement performance-based position sizing
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to adjust position sizes based on recent trading performance to survive losing streaks and maximize winning streaks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create AdaptiveRiskManager class
Implement calculate_base_risk() method (default 2%)
Implement adjust_for_recent_performance() method
Reduce risk by 50% when win rate < 50% (last 20 trades)
Increase risk by 25% when win rate > 70% (last 20 trades)
Cap minimum risk at 0.5% (never go lower)
Cap maximum risk at 3% (never exceed this)
Log all risk adjustments with reasoning
Test risk adjustments with historical performance data

userStories.title: Implement volatility-based position sizing
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to adjust position sizes based on current market volatility to account for different risk levels in V10 vs V100.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_volatility_multiplier() method
Fetch current ATR for each symbol
Calculate average ATR over last 100 bars
Compute volatility ratio: current_ATR / avg_ATR
Adjust position size: size *= (1 / volatility_ratio)
Apply minimum multiplier of 0.3 (for V100 high volatility)
Apply maximum multiplier of 1.5 (for V10 low volatility)
Store volatility multipliers in database for analysis
Test volatility-based sizing on historical data

userStories.title: Implement drawdown-based position scaling
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to reduce position sizes during drawdowns to protect capital and allow recovery.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_drawdown() method from equity curve
Implement adjust_for_drawdown() method
Reduce risk by 50% when drawdown > 10%
Reduce risk by 75% when drawdown > 15%
Stop trading entirely when drawdown > 20% (circuit breaker)
Gradually restore risk as drawdown recovers
Log all drawdown-based adjustments
Test drawdown-based scaling on historical drawdown periods

userStories.title: Implement correlation-based risk adjustment
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to reduce total risk when multiple positions in highly correlated symbols are open.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_portfolio_correlation() method
Fetch all open positions and symbols
Calculate correlation matrix between symbols (last 100 bars)
Count positions in highly correlated pairs (correlation > 0.7)
Reduce position size by 20% for each correlated position beyond first
Example: Long V10 + V25 + V50 = 3 correlated positions, reduce new position by 40%
Log correlation analysis and adjustments
Test correlation-based adjustments

userStories.title: Implement time-based risk adjustment
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to adjust risk based on time of day and trading session patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_session_risk_multiplier() method
Define risk multipliers by hour (stored in configuration)
Example: Lower risk (0.5x) during low-volatility hours
Example: Higher risk (1.2x) during high-opportunity hours
Allow configuration of hour-by-hour multipliers
Apply session adjustments to position sizing
Log all time-based adjustments
Test time-based adjustments on historical data

userStories.title: Implement dynamic stop loss adjustment
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to adjust stop loss distances based on current volatility, not fixed multiples.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_dynamic_stop() method
Base stop on ATR: stop = entry ± (ATR * multiplier)
Adjust ATR multiplier based on volatility regime
Use 1.5x ATR in low volatility (tighter stops)
Use 3x ATR in high volatility (wider stops to avoid noise)
Implement minimum stop distance (0.5% of price)
Implement maximum stop distance (2% of price)
Log all stop loss calculations and adjustments
Test dynamic stops on historical data

userStories.title: Implement profit target optimization
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to optimize take profit levels based on current market conditions and recent performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_optimal_tp() method
Base TP on ATR: TP = entry ± (ATR * multiplier)
Adjust TP multiplier based on win rate (higher win rate = tighter TP)
Use 2x ATR when win rate > 60%
Use 3x ATR when win rate < 60% (give trades room)
Implement minimum TP distance (1x ATR)
Implement maximum TP distance (5x ATR)
Track TP hit rate in database
Optimize TP multipliers based on historical performance
Test TP optimization on historical data

userStories.title: Implement maximum daily loss limit
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to stop trading when daily loss exceeds threshold to prevent catastrophic losses.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_daily_pnl() method
Track all realized P&L for current day
Implement daily_loss_limit check (configurable, default 5%)
Stop opening new positions when daily loss > limit
Allow closing existing positions to manage risk
Reset daily limit at midnight
Log when daily limit is hit
Send alert when daily limit is hit
Test daily loss limit on historical data

userStories.title: Implement consecutive loss protection
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need to reduce risk or pause trading after consecutive losses to prevent tilting.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement track_consecutive_losses() method
Count consecutive losing trades
Reduce position size by 25% after 3 consecutive losses
Reduce position size by 50% after 5 consecutive losses
Pause trading after 7 consecutive losses (circuit breaker)
Reset counter after winning trade
Log all consecutive loss events and adjustments
Test consecutive loss protection on historical data

userStories.title: Implement risk heat indicator
userStories.description: As a trader, I need a visual indicator showing current risk level to make informed decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create RiskHeatIndicator class
Calculate overall risk score (0-100)
Factors: open position risk, correlation risk, daily loss, consecutive losses
Display risk level: LOW (0-30), MEDIUM (30-60), HIGH (60-80), CRITICAL (80-100)
Expose risk score via REST API endpoint
Stream risk score via WebSocket
Log risk level changes
Test risk indicator with various scenarios

userStories.title: Implement risk parameter optimization
userStories.description: As a system, I need to optimize risk parameters over time to find the best settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement backtest_risk_parameters() method
Test different base risk levels (1%, 1.5%, 2%, 2.5%)
Test different ATR multipliers for stops
Test different TP multipliers
Calculate Sharpe ratio for each combination
Find optimal parameters for each symbol and regime
Store optimal parameters in database
Update system to use optimized parameters
Re-optimize weekly
Test optimization on historical data (6+ months)

functionalRequirements: FR-1: Risk management must adapt to recent performance
FR-2: Risk management must account for market volatility
FR-3: Risk management must reduce size during drawdowns
FR-4: Risk management must account for correlation between positions
FR-5: Risk management must adjust stops and TPs dynamically
FR-6: Risk management must have daily loss limits
FR-7: Risk management must protect against consecutive losses
FR-8: Risk management must provide visibility via risk indicator
nonGoals: No machine learning for risk prediction (keep it simple and rule-based)
No complex portfolio optimization (Modern Portfolio Theory is overkill)
No hedging strategies (too complex for this stage)
technicalConsiderations: All risk calculations must be fast (< 10ms)
Risk adjustments must be logged for audit trail
Risk parameters must be stored in database for analysis
Risk limits must be configurable via environment variables
Risk system must never allow position > 3% of account
Risk system must have circuit breakers to prevent cascade failures
Risk adjustments must be explainable (not black box)
Risk system must work in real-time without blocking trading loop
successMetrics: System adjusts risk based on performance
System reduces risk during high volatility
System stops trading at daily loss limit
Risk indicator accurately reflects risk level
System survives losing streaks that would wipe out static-risk system
